commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=af1b88f6a2eef9525afcdc7961c2a2316be5f053)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `dreaming.language` option to the memory dreaming config path, appends hard-coded language instructions to Dream Diary narrative prompts, and documents the new setting.

PR surface: Source +23, Docs +3. Total +26 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect from source inspection: the PR documents `dreaming.language`, while the current memory-core manifest schema still rejects unknown `dreaming` properties before plugin load. No live runtime reproduction was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the stable Dream Diary config API and the contributor needs real behavior proof before a repair or merge path is appropriate.

target.title: feat(dreaming): add language config option for localized dream diaries
target.author: fdiver

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
